Remove osx_bilateral relative path references

These path context notes were remnants from the previous project

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Optimize frontend rendering performance

Phase 1 - WebSocket batch updates:
- Merge 4-6 individual set() calls into single setState() per WS message
- Increase debounce from 50ms to 150ms to coalesce burst updates

Phase 3 - Component memoization:
- Wrap Header, SideMenu, HomeScreen, MainPlayer with React.memo
- Memoize SearchResultCard to prevent 20+ cards re-rendering on any state change
- Add useMemo for categorizedResults in SearchResults
- Fix QueueTrackItem: replace inline arrow functions with stable callbacks
  (pass onMoveItem/onDeleteItem + index, create handlers inside component)

Phase 4 - Polling optimization:
- Reduce voice status polling from 10s to 30s (WS handles real-time sync)
- Add Page Visibility API check: skip polling when tab is hidden
- Fix activeChannelId overwrite: only sync when user hasn't manually selected
- Remove redundant isLoadingBotStatus set() call

Phase 6 - Animation optimization:
- Remove staggerChildren from QueueList (was re-animating entire list on every update)

Phase 7 - Audio element stability:
- Render <audio> element always (not conditionally on isOnDeviceMode)
- Control via src attribute instead of mount/unmount
- Prevents playback loss and unnecessary network requests on mode toggle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(governance): add task governance controls with turn limits, loop detection, stagnation (#238)

* fix: add intra-task loop prevention guards for agent execution

Addresses the GPT 5.3 Copilot-style implementation loop where an agent
repeatedly attempts the same action without progress. Adds four new
guardrails to the team execution template:

- MAX_TASK_TURNS (25): hard cap on agentic turns per task, escalates to
  input-required when exceeded
- Action Repetition Detection: tracks last 5 actions, triggers on 3+
  similar consecutive attempts
- Stagnation Detection: flags tasks with no measurable progress after
  10 turns
- Handoff chain depth promoted from soft warning to hard stop

Registers four new event types in orchestrate.md:
TURN_LIMIT_REACHED, LOOP_DETECTED, STAGNATION_DETECTED,
HANDOFF_DEPTH_EXCEEDED

https://claude.ai/code/session_01APLR2oHKfwhra46MAWS41f

* feat: make loop prevention limits configurable via teams.yaml

Wire teamAccepts, teamHandoffChain, and three new loop prevention
variables (maxTaskTurns, maxHandoffChainDepth, maxStagnationTurns)
into the template rendering pipeline across all platforms (Claude,
Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot).

Teams can now override defaults per-team in teams.yaml:
  - max-task-turns: 25 (default)
  - max-handoff-chain-depth: 5 (default)
  - max-stagnation-turns: 10 (default)

Also fixes two pre-existing bugs where teamAccepts and
teamHandoffChain were referenced in team-TEMPLATE.md but never
populated during sync, rendering as unresolved placeholders.

Updates spec-validator to accept the new optional fields.

All 576 tests pass.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01APLR2oHKfwhra46MAWS41f

* docs: add template variable audit and heuristic defaults plan

Comprehensive analysis of all YAML spec → template variable wiring,
identifying bugs (name mismatches, unwired vars), heuristic
improvement opportunities, and open PR overlap.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01APLR2oHKfwhra46MAWS41f

* feat: fix unwired template variables, add heuristic defaults, and pipe syntax

Phase 1 — Fix unwired/misnamed template variables:
- loggingRetentionDays: templates used this name but mapping produced
  logRetentionDays; add dual mapping so both work
- containerRuntime: add spec field (deployment.containerRuntime) and
  project-mapping entry
- drTestSchedule: add spec field (compliance.disasterRecovery.testSchedule)
  and project-mapping entry

Phase 2 — Heuristic defaults based on project context:
- maxTaskTurns inferred from teamSize (solo=15, small=25, medium/large=35)
- maxHandoffChainDepth inferred from team count (≤3→3, ≤6→5, >6→7)
- maxStagnationTurns inferred from projectPhase (greenfield=15, active=10,
  maintenance/legacy=5)
- testingCoverage fallback from projectPhase (greenfield=60, active=80,
  maintenance/legacy=90)

Phase 3 — Template engine {{var|default}} pipe syntax:
- Adds support for inline fallback values: {{testingCoverage|80}}
- Resolves after normal substitution, before unresolved warning
- Prevents literal {{varName}} rendering without requiring code changes
- 3 new tests covering fallback, override, and empty default cases

All 579 tests pass.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01APLR2oHKfwhra46MAWS41f

* docs: add functional + technical specs for commitConvention auto-detect and spec-defaults.yaml

Two new feature specs to plan upcoming work:

- SPEC-commit-convention-auto-detect: Extends agentkit discover to detect
  commit conventions from filesystem artifacts (.commitlintrc, .releaserc,
  package.json keys) and git-log heuristics.

- SPEC-spec-defaults-yaml: Centralises template variable defaults into a
  declarative YAML file with static, phase-conditional, and teamSize-conditional
  blocks. Replaces scattered inline defaults across synchronize.mjs.

Both specs include functional requirements, technical implementation details,
testing strategy, and rollout plans.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01APLR2oHKfwhra46MAWS41f

* fix(governance): address PR review findings for task governance controls

- Fix spec-validator schema: use `min` instead of `minimum` to match validator
- Extract `buildTeamVars()` helper to eliminate 4x duplicated team variable blocks
- Fix invalid `blocked` status references to use canonical `input-required`
- Fix stagnation detection to track turn count (`_lastProgressTurn`) not timestamp
- Remove duplicate separator line in synchronize.mjs
- Sanitize pipe syntax values in template-utils.mjs for shell target safety
- Update PLAN doc: reflect pipe syntax support, fix variable status, move to docs/
- Regenerate sync outputs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: GOAL-007 — 10 OSS projects pipeline + autonomy deadlock fix

Root causes of idle/reactive behavior:
1. AUTONOMOUS.md deadlocked: 4 tasks all IN_PROGRESS, 3 needing human action,
   1 was the gateway (now fixed). Dispatcher found 0 PENDING → did nothing.
2. Task injector timed out every hour (reads 972-line LEARNINGS.md in 180s limit).
3. No product roadmap — GOAL-007 didn't exist, agents had nothing to build.

Fixes:
- AUTONOMOUS.md: cleared deadlock. BLOCKED tasks labeled. PRJ-001 (RESEARCH)
  and PRJ-002 (ENG) injected as first project pipeline tasks.
- cron/jobs.json: task injector simplified — removed LEARNINGS.md read step,
  timeout 180→120s, rewritten to focus on GOAL-007 project injection.
  New cron added: "Project Pipeline" (weekday 10am) — RESEARCH writes specs,
  ENG gets tasks automatically.
- workspace/GOALS.md: GOAL-007 added (10 OSS projects, 2026-03-05→2026-05-05,
  RESEARCH→ENG pipeline, PM log + PR log tracking).
- workspace/projects/: new directory with backlog.md, pr-log.md, _template/
  (SPEC.md + PM-LOG.md). All 10 projects tracked here.
- scripts/create-project-repo.sh: ENG runs this to bootstrap each project
  (gh repo create + clone + PM-LOG scaffold + pr-log append).
- workspace/logs/tasks-log.md: symlink created (dispatcher was writing to
  wrong path, causing error on every run).

Add Spring AI tool calling learning project

Covers 9 tool calling concepts with REST endpoints for each:
1. Basic @Tool annotation (DateTimeTools)
2. @ToolParam - required/optional params (WeatherTools)
3. ToolContext - secure server-side injection (CustomerTools)
4. returnDirect - bypass model post-processing (SearchTools)
5. Error handling - RuntimeException to model (CalculatorTools)
6. Multiple @Tool methods in one class (StockTools)
7. FunctionToolCallback - Function<> as tool (WeatherFunction)
8. @Bean-registered ToolCallback (FunctionBeansConfig)
9. User-controlled execution loop (ManualToolController)

Also includes:
- Dual model support: OpenAI-compatible + Ollama (?provider= param)
- LoggingToolCallingManager: logs tool call input/output with TOOL marker
- SimpleLoggerAdvisor: logs full request/response per ChatClient call
- logback-spring.xml: rolling file logging with dedicated tools log file
- Descriptive parameter names on all tools to improve small-model accuracy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix impact_sd in 15B masked to sector pixels only

impact_sd was summed over all BCR pixels; at non-sector pixels
bf_sd ≈ obs_sd after the 12B fix, so the unmasked sum added large
spurious uncertainty (~sqrt(2)*obs_sd over the full BCR).
Now masked to sector_mask, consistent with obs_on_S_sd and bf_on_S_sd.
pct_bcr_sd inherits the fix automatically.

Refactor scoring: remove duplicate goal approach, reduce weak-beat CT attraction

- Remove lateGoalApproach block (triple-scoring with goalProximity + passingToneQuality)
- Cap goalProximityScore at +40 (was max ~65)
- Reduce guideTonePreference +25/+10 → +12/+6 (skeleton adherence drives CT choice)
- Add weak-beat scalar preference +8 (stepwise non-CT on weak beats)
- Strengthen thirdsRunContinuation +16 → +22 (arpeggio run stickiness)
- Increase intervalScore fourths +10 → +14 (compete with thirds)
- Add fourthsPct (5-22%) and leapPct (≤18%) audit assertions (+34 tests)
- Lower halfStepRes threshold 18% → 12% (expected from lateGoalApproach removal)
- Update docs, CLAUDE.md test counts (1120 → 1154)

fix: security hardening — CORS, headers, input sanitization, auth separation

- Fix CORS: drop allow_credentials with wildcard origin, restrict methods

  Referrer-Policy via middleware

  approve/reject/list, falls back to SUBMISSION_API_KEYS if unset
- Stop leaking exception details: log internally, return generic error
- Fix infinite recursion on GitHub 403: max 3 retries
- 11 new security tests (123 total)

🐛 Inline Supabase client in each API function to fix Vercel module resolution

so relative imports between files fail at runtime.

feat(invoicing): replace retry with check_status for pending DIAN invoices

When DIAN is validating a document, re-sending POST /sales_invoice/
risks creating duplicates. Instead, we now only SEARCH for the existing
document via ListDocuments API.

New flow for pending_validation invoices:
- handlePendingValidation schedules next_retry_at (check, not retry)
- RetryConsumer detects pending sync logs → calls CheckPendingInvoice
- CheckPendingInvoice publishes operation=check_status to queue
- Softpymes consumer processCheckStatus: searches by comment field
  "order:<UUID>", if found → success, if not → pending_validation again
- RetryInvoice remains for failed-only (POST with idempotency)

Frontend: "Consultar Estado DIAN" button for pending invoices

Add overlay layout for bestiary sketch entries with goblin v2

Sketch entries now use an overlay layout: the portrait illustration spans
the full parchment width (transparent margins blend via multiply), and
annotation notes are absolutely positioned over those margins so they
appear written directly on the page. Non-sketch entries keep the existing
3-column grid layout. Goblin updated to v2 sketch (1920x2240 RGBA).

Fix replaces handling, gate DevTimeSkip to DEV, restore back-nav from Library

- handleOptionClick now filters out node IDs listed in replaces[] when
  updating activePrescriptions, keeping the prescription list clean as
  users progress through the tree
- DevTimeSkip component is now conditionally rendered only when
  import.meta.env.DEV is true, removing it from production builds
- Library onPlay handler now pushes currentNodeId to history before
  navigating, so the back button returns to the correct tree position

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix NaN loss in LearnableSpectralEnhancer: clamp noise_ratio, detach frame_snr

Training produced Loss: nan from epoch 1 due to gradient explosion through
log10(mag²/noise²) in the bypass gate SNR computation. Two fixes:
1. Clamp noise_ratio to max=10.0 to prevent extreme values when mag ≈ 0
2. Wrap frame_snr in torch.no_grad() to block gradient flow through log10
   (bypass_scale/threshold still get gradients via sigmoid)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: API rate limit 완화 — nginx sidecar IP 문제 대응 (#246)

## Summary
- nginx sidecar 도입 후 `getClientAddress()`가 모든 요청에 대해 동일
IP(127.0.0.1/10.42.0.1) 반환
- 전체 사용자가 하나의 rate limit bucket 공유 → 429 폭발 → 사이트 장애
- rate limit 완화: READ 120→600/분, WRITE 30→60/분
- K8s ConfigMap에 `ADDRESS_HEADER=x-real-ip` 추가 (별도 적용 완료)
- nginx `X-Real-IP`를 `$http_cf_connecting_ip`으로 변경 (별도 적용 완료)

## Test plan
- [x] 배포 후 429 에러 없이 API 정상 응답 확인
- [x] 댓글, 추천, 광고 등 클라이언트 API 호출 정상 확인

Co-authored-by: Deploy Bot <deploy@damoang.net>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

style: arithmetically derived color palette from hue 252°

- Tinted grays: hsl(252, 4%, L) with perceptual power-curve lightness
  (γ≈1.8 spacing so each step looks uniform to human vision)
- Accent scale: hue 252°, S 36-50%, three lightness stops
- Danger scale: hue 4° (split-complementary warm red)
- Complaint bar colors: tetradic harmony (252°, 4°, 312°, 198°)
  all at S≈36%, L≈64% for perceptual balance
- Particle glow colors derived from accent-mid
- All hardcoded rgba(93,62,151) → rgba(90,63,154) for hue consistency
- Overlay uses g4 (#c5c3cb) for AI resolution text (warmer than g5)
